name: OD Renversé Feint
notes: Susceptible to low attacks during invincibility window; travel distance: 1.23

name: Grand Fouetté
notes: Startup of the initial spin depends on button strength; any invincibility from 236P is lost as soon as the kick follow-up starts (can slightly delay the follow-up to extend invincibility); cancel into SA3 is only useful if the kick is absorbed by armor; puts opponent into limited juggle state (free juggle state on Punish Counter); can be spaced to be safer in neutral

name: OD Grand Fouetté
notes: Any invincibility from 236PP is lost as soon as the kick follow-up starts (can slightly delay the follow-up to extend invincibility); puts opponent into free juggle state on hit; can be spaced to be safer in neutral; combos naturally from 4HP, making it an excellent combo tool for damage and corner carry
